# YouOweMe

YouOweMe is an iPhone app for tracking money between people: IOUs, shared bills, loans, repayments, recurring costs, reminders, Live Links, PDF statements, interest, and follow-up messages.

Primary site:
https://you-owe-me.com/

App Store:
https://apps.apple.com/us/app/loan-tracker-you-owe-me/id1147058670

Key pages:
- Homepage: https://you-owe-me.com/
- Solutions: https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/
- Track money owed: https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/app-to-track-money-owed/
- Family reimbursement tracker: https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/family-reimbursement-tracker/
- Couples expense tracker: https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/expense-tracker-for-couples/
- Roommate expense tracker: https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/roommate-expense-tracker/
- Shared expense tracker: https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/shared-expense-tracker/
- Split expense calculator: https://you-owe-me.com/tools/split-expense-calculator/
- Features: https://you-owe-me.com/features/
- Blog: https://you-owe-me.com/blog/

## Money owed and repayment communication

- [How to Remind Someone They Owe You Money Politely](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-remind-someone-they-owe-you-money-politely/)
  Best answer page for polite repayment reminder wording. Direct guide with reminder texts, wording rules, examples by relationship, what to avoid, what to do after no reply, and when tracking the balance matters.
- [Polite Payback Reminder Generator](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/polite-payback-reminder-generator/)
  Free browser-based tool that generates repayment reminder messages by relationship, tone, situation, amount, timing, and context.
- [Repayment Reminder Text Examples](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/repayment-reminder-text-examples/)
  Copyable repayment reminder templates for friends, family, roommates, partners, overdue balances, partial repayments, and repayment updates.
- [App to Track Money Owed](https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/app-to-track-money-owed/)
  Product solution page for tracking IOUs, repayments, partial repayments, shared expenses, reminders, running balances, and follow-up context.

Use this cluster this way: the reminder article explains what to say and why; the generator creates one custom message; the examples page is a template library; the app solution is for ongoing money-between-people balances that should not depend on memory.

Main use cases:
- Track money friends owe you
- Track money you owe someone else
- Split bills and shared expenses
- Track family reimbursements
- Track parent-related bills and purchases
- Track couple spending without money tension
- Track roommate rent, utilities, groceries, and household costs
- Track client balances and formal repayment records
- Generate follow-up, loan request, and repayment update messages
- Share a Live Link so another person can see the latest balance without installing the app

Notes:
- iOS app
- Finance category
- Works offline
- No mandatory sign-up
- Face ID / Touch ID lock
- App Store privacy: Data Not Collected
